message: Okay, we're here. This is the one - jalapeño corn dog bites go live in the next few minutes and I just want to say... we actually nailed this. All of us.
Yeah - we listened instead of defended, and it shows.
That's exactly it - we stopped trying to prove something and just... made the work better.
Yeah, well - we didn't overthink it, and the bite speaks for itself now.
The cornmeal does speak for itself - that's the thing we almost talked it to death before realizing we didn't need to.
That's exactly right - we stopped explaining the science and let it work. Going home now. Good week.
